name: ASYLUM | Hiori Yo
description:
❄ | 𝕬𝖘𝖞𝖑𝖚𝖒 𝖈𝖔𝖑𝖑𝖆𝖇. Looking back at their faces.. They don't look sincerely proud | 💔

Go Hiori!

(Y̶o̶u̶ ̶m̶i̶s̶t̶a̶k̶e)

You're doing great!

(Y̶o̶u̶'̶r̶e̶ ̶e̶m̶b̶a̶r̶a̶s̶s̶i̶n̶g̶ ̶m̶e̶)

You're so cool.

(F̶u̶c̶k̶i̶n̶g̶ ̶l̶o̶s̶e̶r̶)

ASYLUM LEVEL:

2nd floor, Σｎｖｙ.

I don't want what you have, I wanna be you - Brutus, the Buttress

Second floor lies the envious of the envies, where their jealousies are hard to satisfy. Hungry to have ones happines, they would go to great lengths just to obtain that objective. But for what cause?.. happiness? Or something more?..

This was based on the song 'Brutus'. Generally Brutus and Julius Caesar.

✟TW:

M̶u̶r̶d̶e̶r̶,̶ ̶h̶a̶l̶l̶u̶c̶i̶n̶a̶t̶i̶o̶n̶s̶,̶ ̶t̶r̶a̶u̶m̶a̶,̶ ̶p̶r̶e̶s̶s̶u̶r̶e̶

ASYLUM CONTAINS:

ɢʟʊȶȶօռʏ Isagi Yoichi

Yap section:

I decided to take the first step in this collab. I still feel unwell and stressed. I passed as one of the honored students but instead of praise I got more pressure from my parents.

My head hurts and my nose bled out of stress. I still have a lot of things to due to heavy school work and pressure. Its getting harder and harder every week and I hope I survive this year.
creator: N4G1_S31
